title: phlegmariurus fargesii
intro: Phlegmariurus fargesii, also known as the Farges' forked polypody, is a species of plant in the genus Phlegmariurus, which belongs to the lycopodiopsida class of vascular plants. Traditionally, Phlegmariurus fargesii has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to expel phlegm, reduce fever, and relieve cough. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate respiratory issues and other health conditions. In herbal preparations, Phlegmariurus fargesii is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
